title: Zammad Ticket Triage
summary: Student validates basic Zammad ticket triage workflow, documentation quality, and completion evidence.
student_goal: Review a help desk ticket, identify whether required documentation is present, and produce a clear resolution summary.

required_evidence.label: Resolution summary
required_evidence.description: Student must include a clear resolution summary in the ticket.

required_evidence.label: Zammad v1 platform validation passed
required_evidence.description: Student must document that the Zammad v1 platform validation passed.

required_evidence.label: Training-ticket workflow confirmed
required_evidence.description: Student must confirm the basic training-ticket workflow was completed.

opening_questions: What part of the Zammad ticket workflow are you validating?
What evidence did you add to the ticket?
Did you document the resolution summary clearly enough for another technician to understand?
completion_signals: Ticket-009 confirms the basic training-ticket workflow
mentor_guidance_rules: Do not mark completion unless required evidence is present.
Do not treat Zammad ticket state as the same as ARIA training completion.
If evidence is missing, ask for the missing documentation rather than giving a final pass.
